name: CI Wizard: Frank issue #126 — ENTSO-e Belpex + SolaX Modbus Growatt MIN
description: Real-world regression from issue #126: Belgian user (Frank-Leysen) with ENTSO-e/Belpex price source and Growatt MOD 5000TL3-XH (GEN4) via SolaX Modbus. Validates ENTSO-e discovery, EUR currency detection, and Growatt GEN4 platform detection.
